name: aidlc-claude-code-dev

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tests.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.adapters.json
scripts.lint: biome check --error-on-warnings core harness scripts plugins tests
scripts.check: bun scripts/package.ts --check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint

description: Dev-only tooling for the AIDLC framework — not part of the distributable. The shipped framework lives at dist/claude/.claude/ and is copied into user projects via `cp -r dist/claude/.claude/ your-project/.claude/` (see README.md). All framework hooks and tools run via bun without requiring this package; bun-types here only powers contributor LSP coverage.
author: Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates
